scores.notes: Clean, correct implementation. Uses snake_case event observation (self.on.data_provider_relation_joined) rather than bracket notation (self.on['data-provider'].relation_joined) — both are valid in ops. Writes to the correct unit databag, uses socket.getfqdn() correctly, includes charmcraft.yaml provides definition. The 'optional: true' field is valid charmcraft.yaml syntax, not a hallucination. All imports are at module level.
